videos.title: Why we need to stop ranking our grief | Kelly Cervantes | TEDxNortheasternU
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: This talk challenges us and our societal urge to rank our relative losses - reframing grief as a shared human experience that resists scorekeeping. videos.title: Why The Grass Isn't Always Greener | Luis Antonio Salvador | TEDxUofTScarborough
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: In his TEDx talk, Luis explores the reality of migration, questioning the belief that opportunity and success are tied to specific locations. videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: From our early education to our professional lives, the modern world rarely feels built for failing safely. So how do we learn the lessons that actually matter? videos.title: SPEAKING ANYWAY: FINDING POWER IN AN UNCOMMON VOICE | Whitney Robinson | TEDxBillings Youth
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: This talk explores how young people move from silence to using their voices to create meaningful change.
